bullish: Price is above the 20 EMA on the 4H
Price holding above prior day high or VWAP
bearish: Price is below the 20 EMA on the 4H
Price rejected at prior day high or failing below VWAP
neutral: Price is chopping around the 20 EMA
Price oscillating around VWAP with no clear direction

risk_rules: Only take trades where R:R is at least 1:2
No trading in the first 15 minutes after 9:30 AM ET open
Maximum 2 open MNQ contracts at once
If I have 2 losing trades in a row, stop for the day
Max risk per trade: 10 points on MNQ ($20 per contract)
Stop trading by 3:45 PM ET to avoid close volatility

session_times.best_hours: 9:45 AM - 11:30 AM ET and 2:00 PM - 3:30 PM ET

notes: Beginner NASDAQ futures trader focused on MNQ. Using Robinhood for execution, TradingView for charting. Start with 1 contract only. Paper trade first.
